title: Learn Korean Naturally Through My Workday Vlog | Real-Life Korea

cues.text: Hello hi everyone I'm running a men's clothing shopping mall
It's a men's clothing shopping mall called 'Chilex Store'
Today I'm going to shoot new winter products
So I brought all the clothes to shoot
Before I go I'm going to have lunch
Then let's go Let's go
The leaves are in full bloom
The road is so pretty I was thinking about what to eat
I was craving Korean food so I'm going to eat
I'm probably going to eat stir-fried spicy pork There's a saying that a man's soul food is stir-fried spicy pork
I don't think there's a Korean man who doesn't like stir-fried spicy pork
Stir-fried spicy pork pork cutlet and hamburger I think this is a new menu that most Korean men like
So it's called a man's soul food
I'm going to eat stir-fried spicy pork which is one of them [I'm going to eat stir-fried spicy pork]
- Can I eat? - Yes [I'm going to eat stir-fried spicy pork]
[Finished eating stir-fried spicy pork]
I'm full It was more delicious than I thought There's too much
I packed the leftover stir-fried spicy pork
It's good to leave it and eat it as a side dish when you eat at home
I still have an hour left until the studio reservation time
Before that I'm going to go to a cafe nearby and work
Now that I've eaten I'm going to go get a cup of coffee
[I'm going to go get a cup of coffee]
Now I'm going to the studio to shoot
I only have 10 minutes left
I have to go quickly Let's go [I'm going to the studio to shoot]
I arrived at the studio to shoot
Usually I just need a white background here
I'm using a cheap studio near my house
I'm going to start shooting [I'm going to start shooting]
I'm going to play a song before I start shooting I'm going to shoot now
[I'm going to shoot now]
Hello I recently lost my ID card
I didn't just lose my ID card I lost my wallet
I had a card and ID card in it but I lost it
I'm here to find my ID card that I applied for reissuance
So I came to the residential center near my house
Those of you who have lost your wallet will know
It's very annoying I have to get everything reissued again
[I'm here to get my ID card reissued again]
I'm going down the stairs [I'm here to get my ID card reissued again]
The maple trees are very pretty
I'm going to open the car door with the car key
I opened the car door
I opened the car door and got in the car
Now let's move to the next schedule the cafe
Today I'm going to go to the cafe and edit the photos I took yesterday
Then I'll move to the cafe I left something at home so I'm going to stop by my house for a while
I just ordered a wallet [I'm here to get my wallet reissued again]
I tend to lose things easily so I didn't know when I would lose it again
I was looking for a cheap wallet so I bought it with this product
It's a brand called My Thank You I think it's a brand that's doing well these days
It's just a neat design
[I'm here to get my wallet reissued again]
I was going to go to another cafe but I'm just going to a cafe where I work
I have to go to work at 5 o'clock but I only have two hours left
If I go to another cafe I think I'll spend too much time moving around
I don't think I'll be able to work much so I'm going to go to a cafe where I work
I'm going to edit the picture and start working at the cafe
The cafe I work at has good coffee
And if you go there you can drink coffee for free
[I'm here to get my wallet reissued again]
